nasb.text: While the earth remains, Seedtime and harvest, And cold and heat, And summer and winter, And day and night Shall not cease.”

esv.text: While the earth remains, seedtime and harvest, cold and heat, summer and winter, day and night, shall not cease.”

cnv.text: 大地尚存之日， 播種、收割， 寒暑、 冬夏、 白晝和黑夜 必然循環不息。”

ccb.text: 只要大地尚存，播种收割、夏热冬寒、白昼黑夜必永不停息。”

csbs.text: 只要大地还存留， 稼穑、寒暑、冬夏、昼夜 就不会停息。”
